texto: Alone in the worn mahogany paneled library surrounded by hundreds of books that filled every shelf and lined every wall from floor to ceiling, Lady Butler contemplated, How odd it is that a room filled with millions of words can be so silent.
explicacao: Citação de Lance Taubold sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Alone in the worn mahogany paneled library surrounded by hundreds of books that filled every shel…” articula reflexao, thought-provoking, filled em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
